name: Incident Followup
description: Composite skill — runs the postmortem chain after any production incident (hotfix, rollback, or prod outage). Chains adt-research → adr-write → generate-tests → security-sweep (conditional) → knowledge-loop → handoff. Stops the silent-postmortem failure mode where a hotfix ships and the lessons evaporate. Fires after /hotfix Phase 10 or when user says 'postmortem' / 'what did we learn'.
author: Lucas Santana

pt-BR.name: Follow-up de Incidente
pt-BR.description: Skill composto — roda a cadeia de postmortem depois de qualquer incidente de produção (hotfix, rollback ou outage). Encadeia adt-research → adr-write → generate-tests → security-sweep (condicional) → knowledge-loop → handoff. Acaba com o modo de falha do postmortem silencioso onde o hotfix sobe e as lições evaporam. Dispara após /hotfix fase 10 ou quando o usuário diz 'postmortem' / 'o que aprendemos'.
